titel: Activities within the European Union in 2024.
html: In this report, the government outlines the activities of the European Union during 2024, in accordance with Section 21 of Chapter 9 of the Swedish Parliament's Rules of Procedure. The report provides a comprehensive overview of the European Union's development and its relations with the outside world, as well as its economic and social cooperation, cooperation on legal and internal affairs, and the Union's institutions. It covers decisions and events within the Union and illustrates the breadth of the Union's activities based on the work carried out in the various configurations of the Council.
tldr: The government is providing an overview of the work carried out within the EU during the year 2024. The text details the events that have taken place and explains how Sweden collaborates with other countries in Europe.
lattlast:
The government has published a report detailing the activities of the European Union (EU) during the year 2024. This report serves as a means for the government to inform the parliament about the progress of work within the EU.

The text describes how the EU collaborates with countries outside the union, and how countries within the EU work together on economic and social issues. It also covers cooperation on laws and issues related to security and borders.

The report also examines the functioning of key organizations and authorities within the EU. It highlights the various areas in which the EU makes decisions and how the different meetings and groups within the EU have operated.
